pendingMove..write: auth != null && newData.child('from').val() === auth.uid && (root.child('games').child($gameId).child('playerUids').child('1').val() === auth.uid || root.child('games').child($gameId).child('playerUids').child('2').val() === auth.uid)

$slot..write: auth != null && root.child('games').child($gameId).child('playerUids').child($slot).val() === auth.uid && (newData.val() === true || newData.val() === false)
